title: Add learning feedback loop to interpreter API route
completion_summary: Added learning feedback loop: conversationLearner.learnFromTurn for assistant mode, confirmLearning request body, learningSuggestions in response payload

context_files.reason: Current API route structure and learning feedback loop requirements

acceptance_criteria: After successful translation, route calls conversationLearner.learnFromTurn(input, output, mode)
Response payload includes learningSuggestions field with pending suggestions for user confirmation
Request body accepts optional confirmLearning field { id, accepted }
Confirmed learnings are wired back to learningStore via confirmSuggestion/rejectSuggestion
Existing route logic (tolk mode, quality guards, provider chain) unchanged
All existing route behavior preserved for non-learning requests
